description: CADTALK Deal Desk — the complete sales operating system for CADTALK reps.

plugins.name: cadtalk-sales-team
plugins.description: CADTALK Deal Desk — Jeff Brickler's sales process, packaged for the team. Deal-folder lifecycle, research, qualification, discovery/demo prep, outreach, proposals, contract prep, CRM single-writer + hygiene, scheduled automation, pipeline reports, and a self-improving learning loop.
